purpose: Persistent compact memory for project prompts. Store decisions, gotchas, preferences, and verification notes; never store secrets or raw private data.

entries.summary: Future prompts should use the lowest-token path: AGENTS.md, project_memory, project_contexts, and Graphify queries before broad file reads or full-repo dumps.
entries.details: Graphify is installed as graphifyy and graphify-out contains the local project graph. External agent frameworks are reference/context tools unless a bounded adapter and tests are added.

entries.summary: Verified Telegram delivery and PM2 bot health on 2026-05-16: fixed core startup indentation, restored signal executor test APIs, made Telegram send raw text by default, isolated API FeatureStore path, and fixed market scan report fallback.

Added local Python crypto adaptation of seeker-jpg/market-intelligence-platform-app: utils/crypto_market_intelligence.py, CLI, API endpoint /v1/market-intelligence/crypto, context cards, and tests. Classification uses lexical boundaries to avoid short-ticker false positives.
